title: Let’s make a splash... again! Help Plumb-Rite keep the title of Best Plumbing Company
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Last year, you honoured...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Last year, you honoured Plumb-Rite with the title of Best Plumbing Company in Mossel Bay – and we’re ready to make a splash once more!","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Last year, you honoured Plumb-Rite with the title of Best Plumbing Company in Mossel Bay – and we’re ready to make a splash once more!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With nominations now open, we’re calling on our loyal clients and community to help us keep the title by casting your vote.","html":"With nominations now open, we’re calling on our loyal clients and community to help us keep the title by casting your vote."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At Plumb-Rite, we believe that to be the best, you have to prioritise people. Since opening our doors in 2007, we've built a reputation based on trust, quality workmanship, and professional service.","html":"At Plumb-Rite, we believe that to be the best, you have to prioritise people. Since opening our doors in 2007, we've built a reputation based on trust, quality workmanship, and professional service."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As qualified and registered plumbers, we pride ourselves on meeting every plumbing need with precision and care – from the smallest leak to large-scale installations.","html":"As qualified and registered plumbers, we pride ourselves on meeting every plumbing need with precision and care – from the smallest leak to large-scale installations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our wide range of services includes:"},{"type":"list","items":["Plumbing Maintenance & Repairs","Plumbing Renovations","Commercial Plumbing Projects","Fire Hydrant Systems","Civil Plumbing Maintenance","Pumps & Storage Tanks","Geyser Installations and Repairs","Drain Cleaning & Solutions","New Installations for Homes & Businesses"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No matter the time or day, our team is here to help – even during holidays – because we understand that plumbing problems don’t stick to office hours.","html":"No matter the time or day, our team is here to help – even during holidays – because we understand that plumbing problems don’t stick to office hours."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"That’s why our 24/7 emergency lines are always open:"},{"type":"list","items":["Mossel Bay: 083 484 8786","George: 082 677 1797"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plumb-Rite is more than just a company – we’re a family. Our values are deeply rooted in service, integrity and faith, and we are truly thankful for the support of every client who has helped shape our journey.","html":"Plumb-Rite is more than just a company – we’re a family. Our values are deeply rooted in service, integrity and faith, and we are truly thankful for the support of every client who has helped shape our journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your vote is the best seal of approval. Let’s do it again – vote Plumb-Rite the Best Plumbing Company in Mossel Bay! www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/","html":"Your vote is the best seal of approval. Let’s do it again – vote Plumb-Rite the Best Plumbing Company in Mossel Bay! www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/mossel-bay/"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Let’s make a splash... again! Help Plumb-Rite keep the title of Best Plumbing Company
